informal_pl: arctan x = Im(log(1 + i·x)) = Re(−i·log(1 + i·x)).
informal_en: arctan x = Im(log(1 + i·x)) = Re(−i·log(1 + i·x)).
lean_target_signature: theorem emlterm1c_for_arctan : ∃ t : EMLTermℂ₁, ∀ x : ℝ, (EMLTermℂ₁.eval (x : ℂ) t).re = Real.arctan x := by sorry
